info.title: Photo Diary API
info.description: Self-hosted photo-diary backend. Schema is generated from TypeBox-validated route handlers.

bearer.description: JWT issued by POST /api/v1/tokens. Send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

get.summary: Get one meta entry by key

put.summary: Update one meta entry by key (admin)

delete.summary: Delete one meta entry by key (admin)

post.summary: Log in, issuing access + refresh tokens
Rotate refresh token, issue a new access token

delete.summary: Revoke all sessions for another user (admin)

get.summary: List galleries visible to the requester

put.summary: Set gallery icon from a photo crop (gallery admin)

get.summary: List photos with optional filters; returns a paginated page of the matching set sorted newest-first by capture timestamp

post.summary: Clear and re-fetch geocoded data for one photo (admin)

get.summary: Get one photo's metadata in a gallery's context

put.summary: Link a photo to a gallery (admin)

delete.summary: Unlink a photo from a gallery (admin)
Delete a group (admin). FK cascade clears memberships and grants.

get.summary: List user ids in a group (admin)

put.summary: Add a user to a group (admin)

delete.summary: Remove a user from a group (admin)

tags.name: gallery-photos
tags.description: Photo metadata scoped to one gallery
